name: Achievement badges
when_to_use: 需要把一个总进度标量和若干“已获得/待解锁”成就做成可扫读奖章墙时用它：适合学习关卡、挑战活动、社区贡献和模拟器奖励。需要用户领取、装备或把选择回传 AI 时应换成交互式任务系统；只有单一百分比时用进度条或 metric-delta。
why_valuable: 奖励状态若只写成列表，很难产生“已达成”和“下一步还差多少”的视觉区分；本组件把总体完成度、奖章图形、✓ earned、✗ locked 与琥珀色解锁进度放进统一卡片网格。

data_in.note: data.value/target 是顶部总进度标量，target 必须大于 0；badges 是解释该标量的奖章集合。earned=true 时该奖章显示 100%；未获得奖章若同时给出 progress 和 target，则显示距解锁进度，否则显示未开始。所有 progress 都会夹到 0–100% 视觉范围。

schema.title?: string —— 奖章墙标题；省略时显示 “Achievements”
schema.unit?: string —— 总体值单位，例如 badges earned
schema.summary?: string —— 顶部说明；省略时由 value、target、unit 生成
schema.badges: {icon?:string,label:string,description?:string,earned:boolean,progress?:number,target?:number,unit?:string}[] —— 奖章卡；icon 为短字符/emoji，未获得且 progress/target 有效时显示解锁进度

spec.note: 按奖章数量自动增高；自适应网格最小列宽 190px，520px 以下单列。无 vh、输入控件和载体尺寸读取。

example._why: 用学习连续挑战展示 40% 总进度、两个已获得奖章、两个部分进度和一个未开始锁定奖章，覆盖全部状态语义。

minimal.title: SQL learning streak
minimal.summary: 2 of 5 milestones unlocked · keep the query streak alive

badges.label: First Query
badges.description: Run your first successful SELECT statement.

badges.label: Join Apprentice
badges.description: Combine data from two related tables.

badges.label: Week Streak
badges.description: Practice SQL on seven different days.

uplink: display-only，无 uplink；组件不派发宿主或全局事件，所有悬停反馈都只发生在自有 shadow root 内。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need a scannable medal wall that combines one overall progress scalar with several earned/locked achievements: suitable for learning levels, challenges, community contributions, and simulator rewards. If users must claim or equip rewards or send selections back to AI, use an interactive task system instead; for a single percentage, use a progress bar or metric-delta.
en.why_valuable: A plain reward-status list makes it hard to distinguish what is complete from how far away the next goal is; this component combines overall completion, badge artwork, earned and locked markers, and amber unlock progress in one card grid.

data_in.note: data.value/target is the overall progress scalar at the top, and target must be greater than 0; badges is the collection that explains that scalar. An earned=true badge displays 100%; an unearned badge with valid progress and target displays unlock progress, otherwise it displays not started. All progress is clamped to a visual range of 0-100%.

schema.title?: string -- Badge-wall title; displays "Achievements" when omitted
schema.unit?: string -- Unit for the overall value, such as badges earned
schema.summary?: string -- Top description; generated from value, target, and unit when omitted
schema.badges: {icon?:string,label:string,description?:string,earned:boolean,progress?:number,target?:number,unit?:string}[] -- Badge cards; icon is a short character/emoji, and an unearned badge shows unlock progress when progress/target is valid

spec.note: Grows automatically with the badge count; responsive grid with a minimum column width of 190px, switching to one column below 520px. No vh, input controls, or carrier-size reads.
